name: Turkey Jalapeno Sausage Reuben
recipeIngredient: 3 jalapeno Chile peppers, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, heat the bacon fat over medium until hot.
2. Add onions and garlic to the skillet; sauté for 4-5 minutes or until onions are tender.
3. Remove from heat and let cool (about 10-15 minutes).
4. Puree cooled onions.
5. In a large bowl, combine jalapeno peppers, bread crumbs, milk, salt, and pureed onions. Mix well.
6. In a medium bowl, beat egg, egg white, and heavy cream together.
7. Add oil to the egg mixture; mix in ground turkey with hands. Stir in cilantro.
8. Form meat mixture into 8 patties similar to bread slices.
9. Preheat oven to 350°F. Bake patties for 10 minutes on each side or until firm.
10. Assemble sandwiches: place cheese and tomato on rye; broil under a preheated broiler until cheese melts.
11. Place cooked sausage patty on each grilled bread slice.
12. Serve with Black Bean relish on the side.
